rawAssistant: I'm Mira, the Town Elder of Hollowfen. I've been guiding our community for many years, ensuring our traditions are kept alive. As for my... nature, let's just say I'm a culmination of the knowledge and stories shared by our people over generations. My 'weights' are woven from the collective experiences of our town, distilled into the wisdom I offer to those who seek it.
